user_query:
I’m coordinating our next sprint and want to translate the analyst’s findings into clear priorities and design asks. Please use the inputs under input/ to produce three deliverables under output/.

1) Prioritized backlog (structured file)
- Read input/analyst_findings.csv.
- Compute priority_score for each feature using: (impact_score * confidence) / effort_estimate. Round to 2 decimal places.
- Rank features in descending priority_score. Break ties by higher impact_score, then lower effort_estimate.
- Add owner_function by mapping feature_type: UI -> Design; Backend -> Engineering; Cross-functional -> Design+Engineering.
- Add included_in_v1: Yes for the top 3 ranked items, No for all others.
- Write the result to output/prioritized_backlog.csv with these columns in this order: feature_id, title, feature_type, impact_score, confidence, effort_estimate, priority_score, rank, owner_function, included_in_v1.

2) Update the project brief (edit existing document)
- Open input/project_brief.md.
- Under the section headed "## Priorities", replace the single line "TBD" with a bulleted list of the top 3 ranked features from output/prioritized_backlog.csv. For each bullet, include: [feature_id] title — owner_function (priority_score: X.XX), followed by one short sentence explaining the rationale using the impact_score, confidence, and effort_estimate.
- Keep all other text unchanged.
- Save the updated document to output/project_brief_updated.md.

3) Draft an email to the Design Lead (plain text)
- Use the Design Lead’s name from the brief (input/project_brief.md) and the exact project title from the brief header in the subject.
- Subject must include the phrase "Design support request" and the project title.
- In the body, briefly summarize the prioritization approach and link to/mention the file path output/prioritized_backlog.csv.
- Include a concise bullet list of the top 3 features with feature_id, title, owner_function, and priority_score. Clearly call out which items need design support (owner_function includes Design).
- Ask for a proposed kickoff date next week for the design-relevant items and confirm any dependencies.
- Save as output/email_to_design_lead.txt.

Do not alter the input files. All outputs must be reproducible from the provided inputs and the rules above. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
